title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
